title: Audit trickle.rs implementation against spec pseudocode
description: Review rust/lichen-rpl/src/trickle.rs for exact match to RPL Trickle algorithm in spec (likely spec/04-rpl.md or similar). Update to match pseudocode precisely. Remove all TODOs and worker comments.
close_reason: Audit complete: exact pseudocode match confirmed via subagent exploration; worker comments cleaned in trickle.rs and corresponding C impl; no TODOs/dead code; tests cross-checked with Python/C equivalents; no_std compliant
